title: Armor Ideas
description: A mod that adds 4 new armors inspired by my community !
body:
# 4 New Armors for Minecraft

I asked my YouTube subscribers to suggest armor ideas — and I picked 4 of them to bring into the game through this mod!

---

## 🐠 Aqua Armor

This set completes the turtle helmet with custom aquatic gear: **Squid Leggings**, a **Guardian Chestplate**, and **Axolotl Boots**.

![Axolotl boots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b35232cdce793b5680ca07042ba99e8af38038d6.png)
![Guardian armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9a27777176f3f6a246bedf8b23bc253b4588569.png)
![Squid Leggings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9aacb6787e37a8a1276ed100d7e9cb6ba5b16256.png)

When wearing the full set, you’ll **swim faster** and become **immune to mining fatigue**!

![Swimming with full aqua armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d20ecdb4c27c9bf5ea51fc0d6b6adb7bc56ea02.jpeg)

---

## 🟩 Slime Armor

This bouncy armor lets you **jump higher**, **repel attacking mobs**, and **bounce off the ground** like a slime block.

![Slime Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8164a793abc267a3a679421f6d826ec7db6d0e54.jpeg)

Wearing the **Slime Helmet** even lets you **stick to ceilings** and move freely across them!

![Slime Helmet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39c3d8d5bd78478329b9c9af1fd6f2062d03f85e.jpeg)

---

## 🤖 Robot Armor

An upgrade from copper armor, the **Robot Armor** runs on redstone energy to unleash powerful abilities like **electric pulses** and **high-speed dashes**.

![Dash from the Robot armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b4848f0a525e5e5e839ea8a2d873565fd0f9450.jpeg)

---

## 🪨 Obsidian Armor

Heavier than Netherite, **Obsidian Armor** offers superior protection — but comes at a cost.  
Wearing it will apply **Slowness**, **prevent you from riding entities**, and **cause you to sink in water**.

![LAirHisson Obsidian Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/545f6bf35d72743c244b333f1781fbad33bb439b.jpeg)
